DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-08-2002 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances Manson F. Wong, (415) 986-6000, defendant and demurring party appeared in propria person. Priscilla Wong, Esq., (415) 982-2345, appeared on behalf of the plaintiff Wong Family Benevolent Association, Inc.

After argument the Court overruled Manson F. Wong's demurrer and granted five days leave to answer. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
